name: services-debug-normalization
treeText:
section.section_services
  div.padding-top
    div.container-medium
      div.services_component
        div.services_intro
          h2.heading-style-h2 "Technology Solutions for Growing Businesses"
          p.text-size-medium "We design, develop, and optimize digital systems."
          div.button-group
            button.button "Book a Free Strategy Call"
            span
            div.icon-embed-xsmall
        div.services_list
          div.services_item
            div.services_item_icon
            div.services_item_content
              p.text-style-tagline "Growth Foundation"
              h3.heading-style-h3 "Websites That Convert"
              p.text-size-medium "Modern, conversion-optimized websites."

name: hero-background-video-hoists-past-source
treeText:
section.section_hero
  div.hero_background-media
    video
      source
        div.container-large
          div.padding-section-large
            div.hero_component

name: authority-text-blocks-and-icon-placeholders
treeText:
section.section_authority
  div.padding-xlarge
    div.authority_component
      div.authority_header
        p.text-style-tagline "FOUNDED IN 1995"
        h2.heading-style-h2 "30 Years of Innovation. Built for What's Next."
        p.text-size-medium "Since 1995, we’ve helped businesses navigate every major shift in web technology."
      div.authority_layout
        div.authority_orbit
          span.authority_orbit_ripple
          span.authority_orbit_ripple
          span.authority_orbit_ripple
          div.authority_orbit_core
            span.authority_orbit_value "30"
            p.text-size-medium "Years of innovation"
        div.authority_list
          div.authority_item
            div.authority_item_header
              p.authority-mini-label "Milestone"
              img.icon-embed-xsmall
            p.authority_item_value "500+"
            p.text-size-medium "Projects Delivered"
            p.text-size-small "Launches, rebuilds, migrations, apps, and growth-focused iterations."
